source: MITRE ATT&CK S0368 + Cisco Talos + ESET
evidence_status_note: NotPetya is comparatively well documented. Tactics (9) and techniques (15) are documented by MITRE ATT&CK S0368, Cisco Talos and ESET. Lateral movement is documented (SMB admin shares / EternalBlue). Persistence is coded documented_absence: NotPetya is a destructive wiper that did not retain a foothold; the Persistence tactic and Scheduled Task technique in the mapping relate to reboot-triggering of the wipe, not survival. Stealth (0.25) is an analyst inference from the overt, destructive nature, not a directly measured value.
